title: calystegia peirsonii
intro: Calystegia peirsonii, also known as Peirson's morning glory, is a type of flowering vine native to the southwestern United States and Baja California, Mexico. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Calystegia peirsonii include reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and stress, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent, and are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
